title.es: Evaluación de un Modelo de Regresión

description.en: Formally evaluate your company's sales regression model before staging: run temporal cross-validation (≥5 folds, mean ± std), generate learning curves, compare MAE and RMSE with business justification from CONTEXT.md, write an evidence-backed diagnosis (well fitted / underfitting / overfitting), and propose a specific corrective action.
description.es: Evalúa formalmente tu modelo de regresión de ventas antes de staging: ejecuta validación cruzada temporal (≥5 folds, media ± desviación estándar), genera curvas de aprendizaje, compara MAE y RMSE con justificación de negocio desde CONTEXT.md, redacta un diagnóstico respaldado por evidencia (bien ajustado / underfitting / overfitting) y propón una acción correctiva específica.

sharing.en: I just completed Evaluating a Regression Model with LearnPack @4GeeksAcademy. Ran temporal cross-validation, learning curves, MAE/RMSE comparison, and wrote an evidence-backed overfitting/underfitting diagnosis. Check it out: https://github.com/4GeeksAcademy/ai-engineering-syllabus/tree/main/content/projects/ai-eng-evaluating-regression-model #AIEngineering #LearnPack #4GeeksAcademy #python #machinelearning #regression
